results.title: What I *actually* do as a Product Manager (in 2023)
results.reason: Highly relatable day-in-the-life format that clarifies the role's reality for beginners, backed by strong viewer engagement.
summary: Daily tasks and routines of a modern manager
How to work with designers and engineers
Ways to solve problems for real users
The reality of meetings and decision making

results.title: Product Management 101: Everything You Need to Know (Full Course)
results.reason: The most comprehensive 'course' style video in the list, effectively combining multiple modules into a structured learning path.
summary: Basic steps to build a successful product
How to research what customers really want
Setting goals and tracking your progress
Leading a team without being their boss

results.title: What do product managers do? - Agile Coach
results.reason: Professional production from a reputable industry leader (Atlassian) provides a concise, high-level overview perfect for day-one learners.
summary: The main purpose of the management role
Balancing business needs with technical limits
How to prioritize the most important work
Connecting different teams to reach one goal

results.title: The Art of Product Management with Sachin Rekhi (ENG’05 W’05)
results.reason: High-level academic and professional insights from Wharton that offer deep 'why' explanations, though perhaps dense for a total novice.
summary: Finding the right vision for your product
How to design features that people love
Marketing strategies to help your product grow
Skills needed to lead a creative team

results.title: What Are the Basics of a #ProductManager Role by Google PM, Ankit Prasad
results.reason: A deep-dive session from a Google PM that provides industry-standard perspectives, though the hour-long format requires high commitment.
summary: Core responsibilities at a large tech company
How to think like a product owner
Simple frameworks for making tough choices
Tips for starting a career in management
